parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
title 解析处理@EnableTransactionManagement注解

participant ConfigurationClassPostProcessor
participant ConfigurationClassParser
participant ComponentScanAnnotationParser
participant AdviceModeImportSelector
participant TransactionManagementConfigurationSelector
participant ConfigurationClass
participant ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader
participant AutoProxyRegistrar
participant AopConfigUtils

-> ConfigurationClassPostProcessor: postProcessBeanDefinitionRegistry
activate ConfigurationClassPostProcessor

ConfigurationClassPostProcessor -> ConfigurationClassParser: parse(AnnotationMetadata metadata, String beanName)
activate ConfigurationClassParser

ConfigurationClassParser -> ConfigurationClassParser: processConfigurationClass(ConfigurationClass configClass)
activate ConfigurationClassParser
ConfigurationClassParser -> ConfigurationClassParser: doProcessConfigurationClass(ConfigurationClass configClass, SourceClass sourceClass)
activate ConfigurationClassParser

alt 当前被解析的Class被@ComponentScan标注，进行扫描
    group @ComponentScan扫描
        ConfigurationClassParser -> ComponentScanAnnotationParser: parse(AnnotationAttributes componentScan, final String declaringClass)
        activate ComponentScanAnnotationParser
        ComponentScanAnnotationParser -> ConfigurationClassParser: parse(String className, String beanName)
        deactivate ComponentScanAnnotationParser
        ConfigurationClassParser -> ConfigurationClassParser: processConfigurationClass(ConfigurationClass configClass) 递归解析扫描到的类
    end
else 不进行扫描,处理带@EnableTransactionManagementImportBean配置类
    ConfigurationClassParser -> ConfigurationClassParser: processImports(configClass, sourceClass, getImports(sourceClass), true)
    activate ConfigurationClassParser
    
    group 获取到AutoProxyRegistrar、ProxyTransactionManagementConfiguration
        ConfigurationClassParser -> AdviceModeImportSelector: selectImports(AnnotationMetadata)
        activate AdviceModeImportSelector
        AdviceModeImportSelector -> TransactionManagementConfigurationSelector: selectImports(AdviceMode)
        activate TransactionManagementConfigurationSelector
        TransactionManagementConfigurationSelector --> AdviceModeImportSelector
        deactivate TransactionManagementConfigurationSelector
        AdviceModeImportSelector --> ConfigurationClassParser
        deactivate AdviceModeImportSelector
    end
    
    group 递归处理AutoProxyRegistrar、ProxyTransactionManagementConfiguration
        note left of ConfigurationClassParser
            添加AutoProxyRegistrar、AspectJAutoProxyRegistrar到关联配置类
            （即标记@EnableTransactionManagement的类）
            的importBeanDefinitionRegistrars属性中
        end note
        ConfigurationClassParser -> ConfigurationClass: addImportBeanDefinitionRegistrar
        note left of ConfigurationClassParser
            按照普通配置类处理ProxyTransactionManagementConfiguration
        end note
        ConfigurationClassParser -> ConfigurationClassParser: processConfigurationClass
    end
    deactivate ConfigurationClassParser
end

ConfigurationClassParser --> ConfigurationClassParser: 解析完配置类
deactivate ConfigurationClassParser
deactivate ConfigurationClassParser
deactivate ConfigurationClassParser

group 加载配置类的配置信息
    ConfigurationClassPostProcessor -> ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader: loadBeanDefinitions
    activate ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader
    
    ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader -> ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader: loadBeanDefinitionsForConfigurationClass
    activate ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader
    
    ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader -> ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader: registerBeanDefinitionForImportedConfigurationClass
    note left: 如果是由配置类导入的，直接注册到beanFactory
    
    group 处理ProxyTransactionManagementConfiguration，导入了切面BeanFactoryTransactionAttributeSourceAdvisor
        ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader -> ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader: loadBeanDefinitionsForBeanMethod
        note left: 加载@Bean标记的注册方法
    end
    
    ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader -> ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader: loadBeanDefinitionsFromImportedResources
    note left: 处理@ImportResource
    
    group 处理AutoProxyRegistrar，注册了InfrastructureAdvisorAutoProxyCreator
        ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader -> ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader: loadBeanDefinitionsFromRegistrars
        note left: 处理@Import，导入的ImportBeanDefinitionRegistrar类
        activate ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader
        ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader -> AutoProxyRegistrar: registerBeanDefinitions
        activate AutoProxyRegistrar
        
        group 注册InfrastructureAdvisorAutoProxyCreator
            AutoProxyRegistrar -> AopConfigUtils: registerAutoProxyCreatorIfNecessary
            activate AopConfigUtils
            AopConfigUtils --> AutoProxyRegistrar
            deactivate AopConfigUtils
        end
        
        AutoProxyRegistrar --> ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader
        deactivate AutoProxyRegistrar
        deactivate ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader
    end
    
    deactivate ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader
    deactivate ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader
end

deactivate ConfigurationClassPostProcessor

@enduml
```
